goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'de luca cucina and bar'.
Make sure you get 'address', 'postcode', and 'food type'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'cinema'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
